creator: matthias.andree@tu-dortmund.de
text:
Apparently the workaround is to deinstall xhtml-1.1*.

However, what optional dependency in docbook2man might there be that the
sheer installation of the DTDs jeopardizes the installation of
gnome-packagekit?  This seems like a more fundamental problem to me,
even if the problem might be between jade and xhtml-1.1.
